seo.metaTitle: Form Collections in Strapi | CMS Reference

blocks.content: Form collections in Strapi enable developers to create structured form data with validation rules and field dependencies.

blocks.title: Form Validation
blocks.content: Always validate input on both client and server sides to ensure data integrity.
